page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.medium is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the ecs.m2 family. It features 4 dedicated physical cores with 4 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio under a KVM hypervisor. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory allocation of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be fulfilled via network-attached block storage. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.m2.medium provides a high memory density relative to its compute resources. This configuration is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require significant memory footprints without demanding massive parallel processing power. Appropriate workloads include memory-intensive applications, small-to-medium databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated CPU allocation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m2.medium is a memory-optimized virtual server instance running on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 CPU architecture. It features 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs, providing a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that ensures dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. There is no local storage or GPU hardware bundled with this instance, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.m2.medium is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including database hosting, caching layers, and enterprise applications that benefit from a high memory-to-core ratio without requiring local storage.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated physical cores and high memory density for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

32.0 GB of RAM providing a high 8.0 GB per core memory density
